popularStory.headline: Jacques Ier d'Aragon dit le Conquérant (1208-1276)
popularStory.description: Jacques Ier d'Aragon dit le Conquérant (en catalan Jaume el Conqueridor ; en castillan Jaime el Conquistador ; en aragonais Chaime o Conqueridor), né le 2 février 1208 à Montpellier et mort le 27 juil …

zh.lifeSummary: 當King Jacme de Aragón I於1208年2月2日出生在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也時，他的父親Rei Pedro II de Aragón29歲，母親Marie de Montpellier28歲。他於1220年2月13日與Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞阿格雷達結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1276年7月27日在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞阿爾拉享年68歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納文波吉波布萊特莫內斯爾 德 波布萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Jacme de Aragón I于1208年2月2日出生在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也时，他的父亲Rei Pedro II de Aragón29岁，母亲Marie de Montpellier28岁。他于1220年2月13日与Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞阿格雷達结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1276年7月27日在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞阿爾拉享年68岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納文波吉波布萊特莫內斯爾 德 波布萊特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Jacme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: This is the Spanish form of   James  , but in the United States and Canada, and subsequently elsewhere in the English-speaking world, it came to be used also as a girl's name, apparently a variant of the girl's name   Jamie .  In Britain it is now more commonly used for girls than boys, while in North America it is still predominantly a boy's name.

variants.name: James
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

variants.name: Jame
meanings: This is the Spanish form of   James  , but in the United States and Canada, and subsequently elsewhere in the English-speaking world, it came to be used also as a girl's name, apparently a variant of the girl's name   Jamie .  In Britain it is now more commonly used for girls than boys, while in North America it is still predominantly a boy's name.

en.lifeSummary: When King Jacme de Aragón I was born on 2 February 1208, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Rei Pedro II de Aragón, was 29 and his mother, Marie de Montpellier, was 28. He married Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon on 13 February 1220, in Ágreda, Soria, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 27 July 1276, in Alzira, Valencia, Valencian Community, Spain, at the age of 68, and was buried in Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Jacme de Aragón I est né le 2 février 1208, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Rei Pedro II de Aragón, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marie de Montpellier, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon le 13 février 1220, à Ágreda, Soria, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1276, à Alzira, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espagne, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Jacme de Aragón I am 2. Februar 1208 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rei Pedro II de Aragón 29 und seine Mutter Marie de Montpellier 28. Er hat am 13. Februar 1220 in Ágreda, Soria, Castilla y León, Spanien Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Juli 1276 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Alzira, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spanien und wurde in Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Jacme de Aragón I è nato il il 2 febbraio 1208 nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Rei Pedro II de Aragón, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Montpellier, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon il 13 febbraio 1220, nel Ágreda, Soria, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 luglio 1276, nel Alzira, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spagna, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: King Jacme de Aragón Iが1208年2月2日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールで生まれた時，父Rei Pedro II de Aragónは29歳，母Marie de Montpellierは28歳であった。1220年2月13日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンソリアaグレダでLeonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1276年7月27日にスペインコムニダド ベレンシアナベレンシアアルズイラで68歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアターラゴナヴィンボドiポブレットモンエスティル ド ポブレットにて埋葬された。

ko.Monestir de Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona,: 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아 비보드i 포블렛 머네스티르 데 포블렛
ko.lifeSummary: King Jacme de Aragón I(이)가 1208년 2월 2일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rei Pedro II de Aragón(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Montpellier(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1220년 2월 13일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 소리아 a그레다에서 Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1276년 7월 27일 스페인 코먼이다드 발샤나 발샤 알지라에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아 비보드i 포블렛 머네스티르 데 포블렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Jacme de Aragón I nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1208, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Rei Pedro II de Aragón, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Montpellier, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon em 13 de fevereiro de 1220, em Ágreda, Soria, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1276, em Alzira, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espanha, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Jacme de Aragón I родился 2 февраля 1208 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Rei Pedro II de Aragón было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Montpellier, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon 13 февраля 1220 г. в местности aгреда, соря, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 27 июля 1276 г. в местности алзира, веиленся, комунидад веиленсяна, Испания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности моунестир де поблет, поблет, вимбодi, таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Jacme de Aragón I nació el 2 de febrero de 1208, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Rei Pedro II de Aragón, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marie de Montpellier, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Leonor de Castilla y Plantagenet , Reina consort of Aragon el 13 de febrero de 1220, en Ágreda, Soria, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de julio de 1276, en Alcira, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, España, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
